utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So , um , what do you do for a living ?

utterances.speaker: Kristin
utterances.text: Well , um , for the past few years ...

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: Oh no . I thought you said they could shoot the spot without you .

emotion_cause.span: 3_you said they could shoot the spot without you .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: I know , but it is my job . Look , I will try to get back as soon as I can . I am sorry .

emotion_cause.span: 6_it is my job . Look , I will try to get back as soon as I can .

utterances.speaker: Kristin
utterances.text: I am spending most of my time teaching Science ... which is funny because , that was not even my major .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I am spending most of my time teaching Science ... which is funny because , that was not even my major .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , do you think ... would it be too weird if I invited Carol over to join us ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Cause she is , she is alone now , and pregnant , and , and sad .

emotion_cause.span: 10_she is alone now , and pregnant , and , and sad .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Are you sure ? Great . Carol ? Wanna come over and join us ?

utterances.speaker: Carol
utterances.text: Oh , no no no . I am fine . I am fine .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Come on . These people will scooch down . Come on . Come over here . You guysll scooch , will not you ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Let try scooching ! Come on . Come on .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh , Kristen Riggs , this is Carol Willick .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And , Kristin , Kristin ... does something that , funnily enough , was not even her major !

emotion_cause.span: 19_Kristin , Kristin ... does something that , funnily enough , was not even her major !
